quality_notes: Add vulnerability: mention a mistake, failure, or lesson learned. Try 'I was wrong', 'took me years to learn', or 'finally understood'.
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
📌 Secure Auth Flows

Almost everyone falls into one of 3 levels: 🟢 beginner, 🟡 intermediate, or 🟣 advanced.

When it comes to implementing QR code-based authentication, I see teams at each level struggle with different aspects.

The Core Concept is simple: use a QR code to verify user identity, but the implementation can be tricky.

Here's a high-level overview of the process:

- > Best Practices
- > Common Mistakes
- > Key Takeaway
Best Practices dictate that you should use a secure connection and validate user input.

Common Mistakes include using insecure protocols and not implementing rate limiting.

The Key Takeaway is that QR code-based authentication can be secure if done correctly.

So, when implementing it, make sure to follow best practices and avoid common mistakes.

💬 What's your approach to implementing multi-factor authentication in your production environment? 🤔💻🔒📈👀

#QRcodeAuthentication #Security #Authentication #MultiFactorAuthentication #ProductionEnvironment #SystemDesign #CyberSecurity

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 900 680" width="900" height="680" style="display:block;font-family:'Inter', 'Outfit', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, Tahoma, sans-serif;overflow:hidden">
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="HG" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="0">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5B3102"/>
    <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#794203"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#935004"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="BG" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0F172A"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1E293B"/>
  </linearGradient>
  <filter id="hdr_sh" x="-5%" y="-5%" width="110%" height="200%">
    <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="2" stdDeviation="4" flood-color="rgba(91,49,2,0.35)"/>
  </filter>
</defs>
<style>
  @keyframes fd{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(7px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  @keyframes si{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.62)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
  @keyframes sl{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}
  @keyframes fr{0%{stroke-dashoffset:24}100%{stroke-dashoffset:0}}
  @keyframes pu{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.50}}
  @keyframes gw{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 3px currentColor)}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px currentColor)}}
  .fi{animation:fd .48s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both}
  .si{animation:si .38s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both}
  .sl{animation:sl .42s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both}
  .flow{stroke-dasharray:8 4;animation:fr 1.4s linear infinite}
  .pu{animation:pu 2.2s ease-in-out infinite}
  .gw{animation:gw 2.8s ease-in-out infinite}
</style>
